name: Nurse Luma
dialogue: Welcome to the Nursery! I'm here to help you care for your little one.
Remember, a happy creature is a healthy creature. Keep their needs balanced!
If your creature ever gets sick, bring them to me right away.
You're doing great! Keep up the good work, trainer!

name: Ranger Thorne
dialogue: The Thicket is home to many gentle creatures. Tread lightly.
I've been guarding this forest for thirty years. Never seen anything quite like your companion.
Those wild bunnies? They come out at dawn. Best time to observe them.
Take this key - you've proven yourself worthy of exploring deeper.

name: Prophet Sahara
dialogue: The desert tests all who enter. Only the strong survive.
My people have lived here for generations. We learn to read the sands.
The heatwisp are spirits of pure fire. Do not provoke them.
You carry the spirit of the flame. This compass will guide you true.

name: Archivist Kael
dialogue: These ruins predate all recorded history. Who built them remains a mystery.
The gearmin maintain the ancient machinery. They're harmless if left undisturbed.
I've decoded some of the runes. They speak of creatures born from light itself.
Knowledge is power. Perhaps these scrolls will aid your journey.

name: Cyber Maven
dialogue: The Spire is a fortress of pure data. Reality bends within its walls.
My consciousness is uploaded. I guard the ancient algorithms.
The cipherwolf are guardians of encrypted knowledge. Earn their respect.
Your creature's data signature... fascinating. Take this upgrade.

name: Deep Warden
dialogue: Few dare venture into the Deeps. Fewer return.
The abyssal creatures here have evolved in eternal darkness. They sense intent.
I am bound to protect this realm. My duty is eternal.
You seek the legendary ones? Prove your worth, and perhaps they will appear.
